name: Definition of Confidential Information
text: "Confidential Information" means all non-public, proprietary, or sensitive information, whether disclosed orally, in writing, or electronically, concerning a Party's business, operations, technology, financial affairs, or strategies, designated as confidential or which by its nature ought to be treated as confidential.

legal_basis.note: Agreement in restraint of trade — must be specific to be enforceable

invalid_if: Information already lawfully in the public domain
Information legally required to be disclosed by a court or regulatory body
source: Indian Contract Act, 1872; SEBI PIT Regulations, 2015
title: Confidential Information Scope
dispute_hotspots: Was the information actually confidential? — no 'Confidential' stamp applied
Exclusion defence — receiving party claims prior knowledge
Oral disclosure — no written designation, enforceability challenged
